titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the New Music USA Collection
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Jonathan Manton

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Monday February 3, 2020 at 01:00

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: 52 interviews conducted for NewMusicBox, the online magazine for New Music USA.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research. Streaming access to recordings in this collection is available when connected to the Yale network, or otherwise by request.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Rights and permissions for Oral History of American Music materials vary between individual interviews. Researchers wishing to publish or broadcast Oral History of American Music materials are responsible for obtaining direct authorization from copyright holders: generally, the interviewees or their estates.
For this collection, rights for each interview are jointly owned by New Music USA and the interviewee in each instance.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: NMUSA, New Music USA Collection, Oral History of American Music, in the Music Library of Yale University.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged alphabetically by surname of interviewee.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Allison, Ben; Blake, Michael; Horton, Ron; Kimbrough, Frank; Nash, Ted.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Outside container label indicates this is "Part 2" of an interview.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Label on container indicates this is an interview with Marin Alsop. However, the label on the Mini DV tape itself, indicates this is an interview with Jerod Tate, as well as some rehearsal footage.
